Replace field injection with constructor or setter injection pattern by switching to @Value annotation for configuration property.

Simplify endpoint registration by using the direct configuration property instead of fetching it from a bean.
Inject HttpServletRequest as a field to replace the manual retrieval from RequestContextHolder.
Remove the helper method that retrieved HttpServletRequest from the current request context.

Add Keycloak configuration property injection to support conditional authentication logic.
Inject KeycloakService to enable Keycloak-specific user retrieval.
Add helper method to check if Keycloak authentication is enabled.
Add method to retrieve authenticated username, supporting both Keycloak and JWT authentication strategies.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.after: protected String getAuthenticatedUsername() { if (isKeycloakAuth()) { return keycloakService.getUsername(request); } UserPrincipal jwtUser = SecurityUtils.getConnectedUser(); return jwtUser.getUsername(); }
